type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Maintenance was done on heat recovery system, which required down time for the heat recovery system and the most efficient boiler. This resulted in an increase in fuel consumption for the year, and therefore an increase in annual pollutant releases from the previous year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Releases were heightened in the previous year (2019) due to maintenance which required a less efficient boiler to be used. The releases this year (2020) are within 10% of the reported amount in 2018, which is more indicative of a typical year.
